product_details_tab_data.Specific Uses: For a more defined texture, rub the powder into your palms first, then work it into your hair to create your desired style. To add more volume and shape, apply the powder directly to your hair, then style or tousle it for a sharp look. You can restyle or add more powder throughout the day to maintain or increase the structure.
